heroHeadline: Spotify's 20th Anniversary Confirms Bad Bunny #2 All-Time Most-Streamed Artist; "Perfumito Nuevo" First Male Artist with 6 #1s from One Album
heroSubtitle: Tracking the rise from SoundCloud uploads in Vega Baja to 100 billion Spotify streams, a historic Super Bowl LX halftime performance, and Grammy Album of the Year. Spotify's 20th anniversary rankings (Apr 23) confirmed Bad Bunny #2 all-time most-streamed artist globally behind Taylor Swift, with Un Verano Sin Ti the most-streamed album in Spotify history (22B+ streams). "Perfumito Nuevo" (with RaiNao) reached #1 on Latin Airplay (Jan 3, 2026) — making Bad Bunny the first male artist to score 6 #1s from a single album. European leg of the Debí Tirar Más Fotos World Tour opens May 22 in Barcelona — 10 Madrid nights to follow. Spotify monthly listeners: 103.9M.
footerNote: Data sourced from Rimas Entertainment, Billboard, Spotify Newsroom, RIAA, Latin Recording Academy, Recording Academy, Pollstar, Bloomberg, NPR, Remezcla, SoleRetriever, Deadline, Variety, CNN, and major media
